personal.name: Aharon Maslin
personal.headline: Software Developer, Sysadmin, DevOps Engineer, and Pentester. Building robust systems from the ground up.

bio: I am a versatile technology professional with a deep-rooted passion for understanding how systems work from the ground up. My journey began with a curiosity for coding and evolved into a comprehensive exploration of software development, system administration, DevOps, and cybersecurity.

Over the years, I've built everything from simple calculators to complex, low-level system utilities in C. I've constructed custom Linux environments entirely from source code (Linux From Scratch) and developed automation tools to streamline complex workflows.

My experience spans across the stack. Whether it's crafting modern single-page applications, managing containerized infrastructure with Docker, or conducting vulnerability assessments and penetration testing, I thrive on solving challenging technical problems.
I am constantly learning and adapting, driven by the challenge of building robust, secure, and efficient systems.

timeline.description: Took the very first steps into the world of programming, sparking a curiosity that would eventually become a career.
Built a first complete software project—a functional calculator. A simple start that made seeing code come to life incredibly rewarding.
Dove deep into the Angular framework, learning how to build scalable and dynamic single-page applications from the ground up.
Created a handy browser extension to make navigating Wikipedia smoother and more user-friendly for everyone.
Took on the challenge of building a custom Linux system entirely from source code. A fantastic way to truly understand how operating systems work under the hood.
Started exploring the fascinating world of offensive security, gaining hands-on experience with vulnerability assessments and penetration testing.
Wrote automation scripts for Beyond Linux From Scratch, taking the hassle out of package management and streamlining system provisioning.
Built a practical tool designed to help users download and manage their mobile video content more efficiently.
Engineered a custom utility aimed at detecting and removing malicious software, helping to keep infected systems clean and secure.
Explored low-level programming, diving into the intricacies of system calls and memory management.
Put security skills to the test by participating in various cybersecurity wargames and Capture The Flag (CTF) challenges.
Created a bootstrapping script to automate the setup and configuration of Ubuntu environments, saving hours of manual work.
Implemented core data structures and algorithms from scratch in C, focusing heavily on performance and optimization.
Contributed to the development of Lido App, helping build a modern and powerful spreadsheet platform.
Built a single-page application from scratch, using it as a playground to showcase and refine advanced frontend architecture techniques.
Focused heavily on continuous learning—exploring new technologies, reading up on best practices, and refining the existing skill set.

timeline.event: Created online portfolio website with Agentic AI
timeline.description: Built this online portfolio leveraging modern AI-assisted development tools to bring the vision to life and showcase AI-driven engineering.
